_meta.note: Positive messages + select Scripture (ESV) rotated subtly on the topbar. Hand-curated; add/edit freely. `kind` is 'verse' (shows the reference) or 'affirmation' (no reference).
_meta.esvAttribution: Scripture quotations are from the ESV® Bible (The Holy Bible, English Standard Version®), copyright © 2001 by Crossway, a publishing ministry of Good News Publishers. Used by permission. All rights reserved.
_meta.esvUsageNote: Crossway permits quoting up to 500 ESV verses without written permission, provided the verses do not amount to a complete book of the Bible nor account for 50% of the work, and the standard copyright notice (esvAttribution) appears. Keep this set well within those limits.

messages.text: I can do all things through him who strengthens me.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be frightened, for the Lord your God is with you wherever you go.
They who wait for the Lord shall renew their strength; they shall run and not be weary.
Trust in the Lord with all your heart, and do not lean on your own understanding.
God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.
And we know that for those who love God all things work together for good.
Let all that you do be done in love.
This is the day that the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.
Come to me, all who labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.
His mercies never come to an end; they are new every morning.
Let us not grow weary of doing good, for in due season we will reap, if we do not give up.
The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
The Lord your God is in your midst, a mighty one who will save.
...what does the Lord require of you but to do justice, and to love kindness, and to walk humbly with your God?
Progress over perfection.
Don't let perfection get in the way of progress.
Mistakes are just data. Learn, adjust, and run it back.
A kind word carries a key. Encourage your group.
You showed up and gave it your best. That matters.
Stay positive — your attitude lifts the whole team.
Every expert was once a beginner.
Be kind to someone today.
Celebrate the small wins along the way.
Rest when you need to. You're more than your score.
Great groups are built on patience and communication.
Soft skills are more important than hard skills.
Your effort inspires others. Keep it up!
You are loved.
You are capable of more than you know.
Your presence makes a difference.
Every day is a new opportunity to grow.
You are unique. You are special.
Don't forget it's a game: let's have fun!
You've got this.
